narrative:
Athens County has 34,679 registered voters, with 57.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 13.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 29.5%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 15.9 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 25.5% of registrants.
